subcodes.first_line: O Lord! I am a feeble ant, and a weak gnat with broken wings, and feet grown weary from wandering the wilderness of longing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا مور ضعيفم و پشهء نحيف بال و پری شکسته دارم و پائی از دوری باديهء حسرت خسته
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @humility; meekness; lowliness
